headline: Bamco Expands FactSet Stake to $838 Million as Financial Data Platform Drives Recurring Revenue
summary: FactSet provides financial data, analytics, and workflow software used by investment professionals worldwide. Because its platform is embedded in research and portfolio-management systems, the company generates recurring subscription revenue tied to the day-to-day operations of investment firms.

content.title: Bamco Expands FactSet Stake to $838 Million as Financial Data Platform Drives Recurring Revenue
content.summary: FactSet provides financial data, analytics, and workflow software used by investment professionals worldwide. Because its platform is embedded in research and portfolio-management systems, the company generates recurring subscription revenue tied to the day-to-day operations of investment firms.

headline: These Stocks Are Today’s Movers: Adobe, Tesla, Ulta Beauty, SentinelOne, and More
summary: Stock futures were moving slightly to the upside Friday as oil prices rose and Wall Street awaited the release of personal consumption expenditures price index data for February.  Tesla  rose 0.6% in premarket trading.  Better-than-expected fiscal first-quarter earnings were overshadowed by the resignation of the software company’s long-time CEO, Shantanu Narayen.

headline: Reddit Has Turned Bearish on Tesla and the Crowd Might Actually Be Right This Time
summary: Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) shares are down over 9% year-to-date and sitting under $400 today. Reddit’s retail investor community has grown increasingly bearish, with Tesla’s social sentiment score at 28 out of 100, firmly in bearish territory for the past 30 days. The pessimism is grounded in real business deterioration. The core problem is deliveries. A post ... Reddit Has Turned Bearish on Tesla and the Crowd Might Actually Be Right This Time

headline: Tesla Stock Is on Track to Avoid a 4-Week Losing Streak. China Sales Data Are Helping.
summary: Tesla  stock rose early Friday, with a little assist from Chinese sales data.  The move came after Chinese automotive information providers released some sales data.  It’s a big jump, but February 2025 sales data were impacted by plant downtime to upgrade equipment for an updated Model Y.

headline: Elon Musk Is Betting Tesla's Future On A Car You Can't Drive Drive: What Do Prediction Markets Say?
summary: The first Cybercab, without a steering wheel, pedals or side mirrors, rolled off the Austin production line last month. Tesla plans to begin mass production in April. A Car That Can’t Be Driven By Humans The Cybercab is designed to operate exclusively on Tesla’s Full Self-Driving software, with plans to deploy it through a driverless ride-hailing service.
